classes.name: uptick_datawarehouse.workforce.models.CustomReportSummary

classes.name: uptick_datawarehouse.workforce.models.ServerUsage
documentation: Mechanism for this Workspace to update the datawarehouse with it's resource utilisation for licensing.

classes.name: uptick_datawarehouse.workforce.models.SyncedData
documentation:
Upsert entire json payloads into the datawarehouse.

The purpose is store arbitrary blob payloads (not individual models but json tabular data of low rows)

Example usecases:
- all templates
- all postgres tables and their metrics
